arguments.argument: /* Boss Gallery Door script */ if oKeyCodes.kCodePressed[3]=1 and activateTime=0 and global.gamePaused=false { event_user(0) global.bCanSave=0 global.wpWaterLEntry=global.wpWaterLevel global.recAreaTrans+=1 global.newMapX=newMapX; global.newMapY=newMapY global.gamePaused=false writeToPlayerGlobals() if global.bNightmareMode=0 {global.difficulty=2} if global.rmDeaths>=5 {global.chaoRecognition=1} global.rmDeaths=0; global.hitsTaken=0 transition_steps=10 transition_kind=21 room_goto(toRoom) }
